operator_notes: Repo tooling: `yarn handbook:qa:provision-auth-user` (requires repo-root .env with VITE_SUPABASE_URL + SUPABASE_SERVICE_ROLE_KEY).

After provision prints `DUBILAND_HANDBOOK_QA_EMAIL` / `DUBILAND_HANDBOOK_QA_PASSWORD`, copy those lines into the gitignored Paperclip/QA2 workspace `.env` (never commit; never paste secret values into issue threads).
Verify with `yarn handbook:qa:check-auth-env` until `ok` is true (includes SUPABASE_PROJECT_REF presence).
This heartbeat workspace lacked SUPABASE_SERVICE_ROLE_KEY, so GoTrue admin provisioning was not executed here; evidence reflects env-check only.
